prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how trait obligations are fulfilled in the Rust compiler in rust-lang/rust. Find Rust source files implementing: the ObligationForest, the trait selection candidate collection, the impl matching, and the error reporting for unsatisfied trait bounds.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the rust-systems fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how trait obligations are fulfilled in the Rust compiler in rust-lang/rust. Find Rust source files implementing: the ObligationForest, the trait selection candidate collection, the impl matching, and the error reporting for unsatisfied trait bounds.
